item.title: 2WD to 4WD Transformation
item.description: A vehicle undergoes a full transformation from rear-wheel or front-wheel drive into a capable four-wheel-drive system. What upgrades are required for the conversion?

media:content.media:title: 2WD to 4WD Transformation
media:content.media:description: A vehicle undergoes a full transformation from rear-wheel or front-wheel drive into a capable four-wheel-drive system. What upgrades are required for the conversion?

item.title: The only good thing about city driving
item.description: A lighthearted take on city driving highlights the small positives that make traffic and urban roads more tolerable. What makes it worth it?

media:content.media:title: The only good thing about city driving
media:content.media:description: A lighthearted take on city driving highlights the small positives that make traffic and urban roads more tolerable. What makes it worth it?

item.title: LandCruiser Gets a High-Voltage Upgrade
item.description: A Toyota LandCruiser receives a high-voltage system upgrade, pushing it into modern electrified or advanced power territory. How does this change its performance and capability?

media:content.media:title: LandCruiser Gets a High-Voltage Upgrade
media:content.media:description: A Toyota LandCruiser receives a high-voltage system upgrade, pushing it into modern electrified or advanced power territory. How does this change its performance and capability?

item.title: Parts No Longer Available...
item.description: A repair project is complicated by missing or discontinued parts, forcing creative solutions and fabrication work. How do you fix something when replacement parts don’t exist?

media:content.media:title: Parts No Longer Available...
media:content.media:description: A repair project is complicated by missing or discontinued parts, forcing creative solutions and fabrication work. How do you fix something when replacement parts don’t exist?

item.title: Does This Cheap A/C Kit Work?
item.description: An affordable air conditioning kit is tested to see if it can deliver real cooling performance in a working vehicle. Is the low price worth it?

media:content.media:title: Does This Cheap A/C Kit Work?
media:content.media:description: An affordable air conditioning kit is tested to see if it can deliver real cooling performance in a working vehicle. Is the low price worth it?

item.title: Bringing This Old Combine Back to Life
item.description: A long-stored combine harvester is inspected, repaired, and brought back into working condition after years of inactivity. What condition is it in after sitting so long?

media:content.media:title: Bringing This Old Combine Back to Life
media:content.media:description: A long-stored combine harvester is inspected, repaired, and brought back into working condition after years of inactivity. What condition is it in after sitting so long?

item.title: 2WD to 4WD: Full Ram Transformation
item.description: A major drivetrain transformation converts a 2WD Ram into a capable 4WD setup through extensive fabrication and mechanical work. What challenges come with a full drivetrain swap?

media:content.media:title: 2WD to 4WD: Full Ram Transformation
media:content.media:description: A major drivetrain transformation converts a 2WD Ram into a capable 4WD setup through extensive fabrication and mechanical work. What challenges come with a full drivetrain swap?

item.title: We Can’t Seem to Fix This Tractor
item.description: A hands-on look at troubleshooting a tractor repair and working through the mechanical issues step by step. What would you check next?

media:content.media:title: We Can’t Seem to Fix This Tractor
media:content.media:description: A hands-on look at troubleshooting a tractor repair and working through the mechanical issues step by step. What would you check next?

item.title: Turn Your Pickup into a Diesel-Electric Build
item.description: A look at turning a pickup into a diesel-electric build, with a focus on the conversion process and mechanical work. What would you change first?

media:content.media:title: Turn Your Pickup into a Diesel-Electric Build
media:content.media:description: A look at turning a pickup into a diesel-electric build, with a focus on the conversion process and mechanical work. What would you change first?

item.title: Adapting an Audi 01E 6-Speed to a Chevy LS 4.8
item.description: A fabrication project adapts an Audi 01E 6-speed transmission to fit a Chevy LS 4.8 engine, requiring custom machining and precise alignment work. What challenges come with mixing different drivetrain platforms?

media:content.media:title: Adapting an Audi 01E 6-Speed to a Chevy LS 4.8
media:content.media:description: A fabrication project adapts an Audi 01E 6-speed transmission to fit a Chevy LS 4.8 engine, requiring custom machining and precise alignment work. What challenges come with mixing different drivetrain platforms?

item.title: Convert Your Pickup to Diesel-Electric
item.description: A look at converting a pickup to diesel-electric with serviceable parts, focusing on the build approach and practical mechanical work. What would you change first?

media:content.media:title: Convert Your Pickup to Diesel-Electric
media:content.media:description: A look at converting a pickup to diesel-electric with serviceable parts, focusing on the build approach and practical mechanical work. What would you change first?

item.title: DIY Diesel Electric Pickup Conversion
item.description: A hands-on look at a DIY diesel-electric pickup conversion, focused on the build process and mechanical integration. This project covers the kind of fabrication and modification work that goes into

item.title: 95 RAM at a Military Expo #catswap
item.description: Showing a 95 RAM at a military expo and keeping it relevant with a cat swap. A straightforward look at the build and the truck’s place in the lineup. What would you change next?

media:content.media:title: 95 RAM at a Military Expo #catswap
media:content.media:description: Showing a 95 RAM at a military expo and keeping it relevant with a cat swap. A straightforward look at the build and the truck’s place in the lineup. What would you change next?

item.title: How Our Rescued Combine Faced the Blaze
item.description: A look at how the rescued combine handled the blaze, with a focus on the machine and the work around it. What happened next?

media:content.media:title: How Our Rescued Combine Faced the Blaze
